problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Default. Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
